public.app-category.health-fitness
Universal Manifestor uses audio to create immersive meditation soundscapes
Universal Manifestor accesses your audio library for meditation soundscapes
Universal Manifestor does not use Bluetooth
Universal Manifestor does not use the camera
Universal Manifestor does not access your photo library
Universal Manifestor does not use location services
Universal Manifestor does not access your calendar
Universal Manifestor does not access your contacts
Universal Manifestor does not use speech recognition
Universal Manifestor does not use motion sensors
Universal Manifestor does not access Health data
Universal Manifestor does not access Health data
